flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Augustana University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.9k → $40.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Augustana University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.9k → $40.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Augustana University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 2.0k).
